title: GearCraft
description: Step into a world of innovation and creativity with Gearcraft, a modpack built around the CREATE MOD. Construct incredible machines, automate your world, and explore stunning landscapes all with Minecraft.
body:
# Gearcraft – The Ultimate Motion Modpack!
Step into a world of innovation and creativity with **Gearcraft**, a modpack built around the **[CREATE MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**. Construct incredible machines, automate your world, and explore stunning landscapes all with enhanced performance and improved visuals!

## What to Expect?


✔ **Create & Expansions** – Build complex machinery with [CREATE MOD](https://modrinth.com/mod/create), [Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition), and [Create Enchantment Industry ](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry).

✔ **New Worlds & Biomes** – Discover breathtaking landscapes with [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty).

✔ **Enhanced Graphics** – Experience Minecraft in a whole new light with [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) or [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined). Feel free to add your favorite shaders for your own experiences

✔ **Smooth Performance** – Thanks to [Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium), [Dynmaic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps), and [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps), your game runs better than ever.

✔ **Quality-of-Life Features** – Stay organized with [**Journey Map**](https://modrinth.com/mod/journeymap) and **Just Enough Items [(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**.

## Versions
The Project Main Base is the Forge Pack. We also try to make it playable for other drivers, but this is not usable in all versions with all functions. We ask you to excuse this.

## 📸 Screenshot of the **NEW** Menu
![Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/034d64773863eb8f42d94444fcb25537c6b1d758.png)

If you want to reach out to us for your reasons, bug ideas or improvement suggestions then join our Discord Sever Link ist in the Game Menu or here 

[Discord](https://discord.gg/gAussVnZQM)
(We have German and English Channels)

Enjoy **Gearcraft!** 🚀


LG Dev Team Gearcraft (EO)
